{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201300071FA9F5A2B989291AD23D"}"},"total":1265},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7266000939680760576","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看啊写的很好的继续加油更新哦[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][舔屏][舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691747758,"group_id":"7169181607306202116","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N249mAO0iUZwd9Ohu0lbuq0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a7f839ef10c434c81562fd4f63c4d16~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529027&x-signature=Qk6hhNFpIM5APoCzatUPu%2B8G5F0%3D","user_id":"6318101415","user_name":"爱是你我在一起"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6318101415","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1713317772,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7169181607306202116","book_info":{"abstract":"【非后宫】【杀伐果断】【轻松流】【吞噬升级】【打脸】【扮猪吃老虎】
欲练神功，必先自废武功!
丹田破碎的林天，庆幸不是自宫!
仙碑一出，谁与争锋!
林天受伤落寞，修为不得寸进变废柴，自暴自弃，被人设计陷害，唯一丫鬟输掉，还被殴打重伤、废掉丹田;
大能夺天地至宝混沌果被轰杀,一缕神魂被吸入混沌果,重生在刚准备办丧事的林天身上。
依靠混沌世界的功法《噬灵诀》，将破裂的丹田修复成十个丹田隔室，让林天拥有同阶无敌的实力，同样，修炼难度更是别人的十倍不止，依靠吞噬敌人的力量为己所用，实现快速提升修为。
《九转神体诀》既是林天肉身不断强大的功法，更是开发混沌大陆的钥匙，是林天制霸一个时代的基础。
为重回宗门,拯救危在旦夕的师姐、师兄弟，从一个被废之人，飞速的崛起，这个过程之中,资源的争夺、利益的碰撞，与固有的利益阶层发生了争斗，更是发现了魔族潜伏的圣子。
贪财不好色，心中充满正义，除魔卫道，为了人族大义，炸掉通道，独自一人杀向魔族大陆，感天动地，混沌大陆的信仰石碑发生质变。
飞升仙界之后,混沌大陆的信仰石碑,在太古铭文的加持下,成长为超脱三界之外的《仙碑》；
仙碑出，神魔避让，纵横仙界......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6d8df23cbc5fb3bac96a42af322c604c","author":"落叶飞猪","author_id":"","book_id":"7169181607306202116","book_name":"仙碑","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7169181683085017634","read_count":"65666","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"7135944"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"3467","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,重生,诸天万界,架空,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da46c3b3a52a9aab060db592be30af0f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779166807&x-signature=i071lPyREsjcTiXWQpCDF1Vwmew%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"651332951489182","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.7297335e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201300071FA9F5A2B989291AD23D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
